top_signals.title: Philippine Inflation Eases in May Amid Fuel Price Rollbacks
top_signals.summary: Philippine inflation decelerated as ceasefire talks between the US and Iran dampened fuel prices, diminishing the need for urgent monetary tightening.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Iran's Oil Exports Collapse to Six-Year Low as Blockade Tightens
top_signals.summary: Iran's oil exports fell to their lowest level in at least six years in May as the U.S. naval blockade continued to choke off crude shipments and leave tens of millions of barrels stranded at sea. According to shipping data from Vortexa, Iran exported just 209,000 barrels per day (bpd) of crude oil and condensate in May, down from 1.34 million bpd in April and nearly 1.9 million bpd in March. Kpler had estimated May exports slightly higher at 260,000 bpd, but still the lowest level since the height of the Trump administration's "maximum pressure"…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/05 - Implementation of Bank of England Statistics Taxonomy v1.3.1
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Jefferson, Global Economic Developments and the U.S. Economy
top_signals.summary: Speech At the 2026 Bank of Japan-Institute for Monetary and Economic Studies Conference, Tokyo, Japan
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: T&D Will Use Funds From Sale of Insurance Unit for Buybacks
top_signals.summary: T&D Holdings Inc. plans to use the roughly ¥188 billion ($1.2 billion) it will get from the sale of a life insurance subsidiary for share buybacks and strategic investments, including in artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
